body:0002.source: The Management Feed helps admins monitor recent actions on the platform for greater transparency and accountability. It is located in the Dashboard tab of your Admin Panel.
body:0002.target: The Management Feed helps admins monitor recent actions on the platform for greater transparency and accountability. It is located in the Dashboard tab of your Admin Panel.

body:0003.source: Only admins can access this tab, it is not available to project managers or normal users.
body:0003.target: Only admins can access this tab, it is not available to project managers or normal users.

body:0004.source: ⚠️ If you do not see this tab, your current price plan may not include it.
body:0004.target: ⚠️ If you do not see this tab, your current price plan may not include it.

body:0005.source: Which actions are displayed in the management feed?
body:0005.target: Which actions are displayed in the management feed?

body:0006.source: The management feed displays the following action types:
body:0006.target: The management feed displays the following action types:

body:0007.source: Created: when a new input, phase, project, or folder is added.
body:0007.target: Created: when a new input, phase, project, or folder is added.

body:0008.source: Modified: when an existing element is changed.
body:0008.target: Modified: when an existing element is changed.

body:0010.source: Some “Modified” entries include a View details link. Clicking it reveals the exact changes made. If the link is missing, the action was a publication (no detailed change log).
body:0010.target: Some “Modified” entries include a View details link. Clicking it reveals the exact changes made. If the link is missing, the action was a publication (no detailed change log).

body:0012.source: An entry might show that John Doe edited the start and end dates of the phase “Mapping Urban Planning: Demo” in the project “Survey Mapping Toolbox.”
body:0012.target: An entry might show that John Doe edited the start and end dates of the phase “Mapping Urban Planning: Demo” in the project “Survey Mapping Toolbox.”

body:0015.source: Keys ending in _multiloc indicate a text field (e.g., survey titles or buttons).
body:0015.target: Keys ending in _multiloc indicate a text field (e.g., survey titles or buttons).

body:0016.source: How to monitor and filter activity?
body:0016.target: How to monitor and filter activity?

body:0017.source: Open the Dashboard tab in your Admin Panel.
body:0017.target: Open the Dashboard tab in your Admin Panel.

body:0019.source: Use the filters at the top of the feed to refine results:
body:0019.target: Use the filters at the top of the feed to refine results:

body:0020.source: Filter by Project: View all actions on a specific project within the last 30 days.
body:0020.target: Filter by Project: View all actions on a specific project within the last 30 days.

body:0021.source: Filter by User: View all actions performed by a specific admin or project manager within the last 30 days.
body:0021.target: Filter by User: View all actions performed by a specific admin or project manager within the last 30 days.

body:0022.source: Review the filtered results to identify trends, monitor workloads, or target training needs.
body:0022.target: Review the filtered results to identify trends, monitor workloads, or target training needs.

body:0023.source: Where can you monitor user activity?
body:0023.target: Where can you monitor user activity?

body:0024.source: In the Users tab of your Admin Panel, the Last Active column shows when each person last took an action on the platform.
body:0024.target: In the Users tab of your Admin Panel, the Last Active column shows when each person last took an action on the platform.

body:0028.source: Spot areas where re-engagement might be needed
body:0028.target: Spot areas where re-engagement might be needed
